# Perth Commercial Flooring

> Perth Commercial Flooring provides commercial polished concrete, grind and seal, honed concrete, epoxy coatings, polyaspartic top coats, and concrete surface preparation for warehouses, showrooms, retail, hospitality, workshops, plant rooms, and industrial facilities across Perth, Western Australia.

Last updated: 2026-05-23

## Core pages

- Home: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/
- Commercial flooring services: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/services
- Commercial work examples: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/work
- Contact and quote request: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/contact#quote
- Agent-readable catalog: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/api/agent/catalog

## Services

- Commercial polished concrete: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/services/polished
- Commercial honed concrete: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/services/honed
- Grind and seal concrete: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/services/grind-seal
- Commercial epoxy coatings: https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/services/epoxy

## Canonical facts

- Business name: Perth Commercial Flooring
- ABN: 63 775 263 307
- Phone: 0448 483 226
- Email: sales@perthconcretecare.com.au
- Service area: Perth metro commercial and industrial suburbs in Western Australia
- Primary action: Request Quote at https://perthcommercialfloors.com.au/contact#quote

## Commercial price guide

- Ultra Flake epoxy: $75 - $85 per square metre
- Hyper Flake epoxy: $90 - $100 per square metre
- Grind and seal: $65 - $95 per square metre
- Honed concrete: $120 - $160 per square metre
- Mechanical polish: $160 - $220 per square metre

Final pricing depends on site inspection, access, slab condition, repairs, exposure, coating specification, downtime window, staging, exclusions, GST treatment, and program.
